form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at Pau All Weather November 13 over 2000m, 0.7 len behind Thundering with 56.5kg at $1.60. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by long-neck Bordeaux April 5 2025 over 1900m slow track defeating Azov with 59kg. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation seventh of 16 at Deauville All Weather November 25 over 2500m, 3 len behind Hasapiko with 59.5kg at $21. Previously first up; second of 11 at this track April 4 2025 over 2100m, a head behind Odemar with 59kg at $4. Worth keeping in mind.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after a year 3rd of 9 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 2200m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Cassius with 52.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on February 13 2025 over 1900m, 4 len behind Wakaburn carrying 54.5kg at $5.10. Has won second up in the past and is capable of building on that record.

Has won second up in the past and is capable of building on that record.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run 3rd of 7 at Lyon-Parilly on March 15 over 2400m, 2.25 len behind Enea with 59.5kg at $15. At only start last preparation 3rd of 12 at Kincsem Park on September 7 over 2400m, behind Claymore with 62kg at $9.50. Among the chances based on that latest performance.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign eighth of 16 at Chantilly June 15 over 1800m, 7 len behind Bullace with 54.5kg at $19. First up last campaign fifth of 12 at Cholet June 2 over 1900m, 2 len behind Teardrop Explodes with 52.5kg at $8.90. Looking to others for the winner.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of nine weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 15 at Meydan February 6 over 1800m, 7 len behind Dividend with 59.5kg at $81. Previously first up; second last of 7 at Meydan in the G2 Al Rashidiya December 19 over 1800m, 13 len behind Opera Ballo with 57.5kg at $31. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 12th of 16 at this track on March 15 over 2400m, on a wet track; 27 len behind Quest For Magic with 55.5kg at $24. Previously second-up 2nd of 15 at Longchamp on September 11 over 2400m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Don't Shut Me Down with 57.5kg at $5.60. Made the frame on each second up start but looks tested in this.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 11 months. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Strasbourg May 28 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Pleaseman carrying 52kg at $17. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.5 len Orleans May 11 over 2700m defeating Romanello carrying 53kg. Can run a bold race.
